mnemonics: A HALTED Emulator Runs Perfectly Quickly. (Steps: A - Android Studio, H - Hello World, A - AVD Manager, L - Launch, T - Target Device, E - Emulator, D - Deploy, R - Run, P - Project, Q - Quickly)
keyPoints: Create a new 'Hello World' project in Android Studio.
Set up an Android Virtual Device (AVD) using the AVD Manager.
Run the application on the emulator or a physical device.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to set up the AVD before trying to run the app.
Not selecting the correct API level/Target SDK for the AVD and project, causing compatibility issues.
